title: Termite Treatment in Maspeth, Queens | $800–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Maspeth, Queens. Licensed exterminators serving residential & commercial properties. Free inspections. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Maspeth homeowners and businesses face serious threats from subterranean and drywood termites that can compromise structural integrity. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive termite treatment services throughout Maspeth, from Grand Avenue to the Newtown Creek area. Our licensed technicians use advanced detection methods and proven treatment solutions to protect your property investment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of termite elimination experience to Maspeth, Queens, with certified specialists who understand the unique challenges posed by the neighborhood's mix of older wood-frame homes and commercial buildings. We offer free termite inspections, transparent pricing, and guaranteed results with eco-friendly treatment options that keep your family and pets safe.
localContext: Maspeth's many pre-war brick and wood-frame homes, particularly those near the industrial waterfront along Newtown Creek and around Maurice Park, are especially vulnerable to termite infestations due to their age and construction materials. The area's proximity to moisture sources and the blend of residential and light industrial properties create ideal conditions for termite colonies to thrive undetected.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Maspeth, Queens?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Maspeth typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. Smaller homes with localized infestations may cost around $800–$1,500, while larger properties or severe infestations requiring tent fumigation or extensive liquid treatments can reach $3,000–$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in Maspeth homes?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windowsills, mud tubes along foundations or basement walls, visible wood damage or frass (termite droppings), and sagging floors or ceilings. Maspeth's older homes are particularly susceptible, so annual inspections are recommended. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for a free professional inspection to assess the damage.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Maspeth?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Maspeth are completed in 1–2 days depending on the method used and property size. Liquid barrier treatments typically take 4–8 hours, while bait station installations are quicker but require ongoing monitoring over several months. Fumigation treatments for drywood termites may require 2–3 days including preparation and aeration time. We'll provide a specific timeline during your free inspection.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite warranties in Maspeth, Queens?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC provides termite treatment warranties for Maspeth customers, typically ranging from 1–5 years depending on the treatment type. Our warranties include annual inspections and re-treatment if termites return during the coverage period. We'll explain all warranty terms in detail and provide documentation to protect your investment and give you peace of mind.
